hero.name: Hanna Jineth Contreras Salinas
hero.title: Software and Data Engineering Student
hero.subtitle: 5th semester student passionate about web development and data systems. Continuously learning new technologies and best practices to create effective solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.text: Software and Data Engineering student with a strong passion for building robust web applications and efficient data systems. My approach combines solid technical foundations with an eye for clean design and user experience. Constantly exploring new technologies and best practices to deliver high-quality solutions.

approach.title: Approach
approach.text: Continuous learning and practical solution development

talentcorp.title: BI TalentCorp — HR Data Warehouse
talentcorp.description: Full Business Intelligence system for TalentCorp S.A.: OLTP database, ETL with SCD Type 2, dimensional Data Warehouse, and 15 strategic HR KPIs. Includes data governance, role-based security, and Colombian holiday calendar.

mongodb.title: Academic System with MongoDB
mongodb.description: Complete academic management system in MongoDB with JSON schema validation, CRUD operations, transactions, advanced aggregations and change streams. Includes comprehensive technical documentation.

localrent.title: LocalRent — Rental Management System
localrent.description: Rental management system in Java featuring Singleton and Factory Method design patterns, functional programming with Streams and lambdas, and custom exception handling.

database.title: MySQL Database Management System
database.description: MySQL database system with CRUD stored procedures, user-defined functions, and audit triggers for change tracking.

gimnasio.title: Multivariate Analysis — Gym Members
gimnasio.description: Exploratory analysis, correlation matrix and PCA on 970 real records with 16 variables. Includes data cleaning, full descriptive statistics, heatmaps and biplot with dimensional reduction to 4 components.

binomial.title: Binomial Distribution Simulation
binomial.description: Industrial assembly process simulation using binomial distribution in Python. Covers descriptive statistics, theoretical probabilities with PMF and CDF, comparative visualization, and Chi² goodness-of-fit test.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Project (Coming Soon)
fullstack.description: Web project in development focused on applications and data systems.

cv.title: Download My Resume
cv.description: Get a comprehensive overview of my experience, skills, and education.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to discussing new projects, opportunities, or collaborations.

philosophy.title: My Philosophy
philosophy.text: I believe in smooth processes, in the power of simplicity, and that technology can also be poetry. Every line of code is an opportunity to create something meaningful and elegant.
